channel.title: VBM Interior Blog — Interior Design Tips & Trends
channel.description: Interior design tips, trends, and inspiration from VBM Interior, Chennai's trusted interior design company with 500+ completed projects.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2008-2026 VBM Interior. All rights reserved.

item.title: Interior Design Trends 2024: What's Shaping Modern Homes
item.description: Explore the latest interior design trends for 2024 — from sustainable materials and biophilic design to bold colors and smart home integration. Learn how to incorporate these trends into your Chennai home.
item.dc:creator: VBM Interior

item.title: Multiple Wallpaper Design Ideas to Transform Your Space
item.description: Discover creative wallpaper design ideas for every room. From textured wallpapers for living rooms to subtle patterns for bedrooms — find the perfect wallpaper to elevate your interior.
item.dc:creator: VBM Interior

item.title: Small Spaces, Unique Style: Design Tips for Compact Homes
item.description: Smart interior design tips for small spaces. Learn how to maximize every square foot with clever storage, multi-functional furniture, and visual tricks that make compact homes feel spacious.
item.dc:creator: VBM Interior

item.title: Kitchen Design Guide: Plan Your Dream Kitchen
item.description: A comprehensive guide to designing your dream kitchen. Covers modular kitchen layouts, storage solutions, countertop materials, appliance placement, and ventilation planning for Indian kitchens.
item.dc:creator: VBM Interior
